title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal risk, but its widespread adoption could lead to potential misuse by malicious actors to identify exploitable vulnerabilities in unpatched systems.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool's source code and functionality before integrating it into your environment.
Educate teams on secure usage of vulnerability scanning tools to prevent accidental exposure of sensitive data.
Monitor for any updates or patches to the tool to address potential security concerns.

title: Apache Doris MCP Server contains a SQL injection vulnerability in a metadata query path. A user...
description:
Apache Doris MCP Server contains a SQL injection vulnerability in a metadata query path. A user-controlled database name is directly interpolated into a SQL query, and the query is executed without passing the caller's authorization context. This may allow an authenticated attacker, or an anonymous attacker if authentication is disabled, to bypass SQL security validation and access metadata outside the intended database scope.

Affected users are recommended to upgrade to Doris version 0.6.1 or

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in Apache Doris MCP Server allows attackers to bypass security validation and access metadata outside the intended database scope. This could lead to unauthorized data access, data leakage, or potential compromise of sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to Apache Doris version 0.6.1 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Implement strict input validation and sanitization for user-controlled inputs to prevent SQL injection.
Enable authentication on the MCP Server to reduce the risk of anonymous exploitation.

title: Improper escaping of database table names in the CaptureChangeMySQL Processor included with...
description: Improper escaping of database table names in the CaptureChangeMySQL Processor included with Apache NiFi 1.2.0 through 2.9.0 allows for injecting SQL commands using crafted naming. Manual quoted boundaries added in Apache NiFi 1.8.0 narrowed the scope of potential injection options, but did not cover additional strategies. Apache NiFi installations that do not use the CaptureChangeMySQL Processor are not subject to this vulnerability. Upgrading to Apache NiFi 2.10.0 is the recommended mitigation,

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-44913.

title: Apache NiFi 1.12.0 through 2.9.0 are missing authorization when replacing Process Groups that...
description: Apache NiFi 1.12.0 through 2.9.0 are missing authorization when replacing Process Groups that include extension components with specific Required Permissions based on the Restricted annotation. The Restricted annotation indicates additional privileges required, but framework authorization did not check restricted status when handling requests to replace Process Groups. The missing authorization permits a user with general write access to add components with Restricted status. Apache NiFi install

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-44914.

title: The Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 does not properly restrict the roles that can be...
description: The Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 does not properly restrict the roles that can be assigned when creating new users via one of its REST API endpoints, allowing authenticated users with a custom Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 role to escalate privileges to administrator.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Vitepos WordPress plugin allows privilege escalation, enabling authenticated users with a custom role to gain administrator access. This could lead to unauthorized control of the WordPress site, data breaches, defacement, or further exploitation.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Vitepos WordPress plugin to version 3.4.2 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Audit all user accounts and roles on affected WordPress sites to identify and remove any unauthorized administrator accounts.
Implement additional monitoring and logging for suspicious activity, particularly around user role changes and REST API usage.

title: Authorization handling for component configuration verification requests in Apache NiFi 1.15.0...
description: Authorization handling for component configuration verification requests in Apache NiFi 1.15.0 through 2.9.0 allows clients with read access to submit proposed configuration properties. The proposed properties override current configuration, enabling users with read access to invoke predefined verification methods with alternative settings. Apache NiFi installations that do not implement different levels of authorization for viewing and modifying component configuration are not subject to this v

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows users with read access to override component configuration properties and invoke verification methods with alternative settings. This could lead to unintended system behavior or potential misuse of system resources, but the impact is limited to installations without proper authorization separation.
recommended_actions: Implement strict role-based access controls (RBAC) to ensure separation of read and write permissions for component configurations.
Upgrade Apache NiFi to a version where this vulnerability is patched once a fix is available.
Regularly audit and review user permissions to ensure proper authorization levels are enforced.

title: Apache NiFi 0.0.1 through 2.9.0 support building qualified URLs from one of several HTTP request...
description: Apache NiFi 0.0.1 through 2.9.0 support building qualified URLs from one of several HTTP request headers that provide an alternative to the standard Host header without validating the values provided. Apache NiFi 1.6.0 introduced a configurable application property to restrict values provided in the HTTP Host header, but did not apply the validation to alternative Proxy and Forwarded headers. The absence of proxy host header validation allowed a client to instruct Apache NiFi web services to con

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-54665.

title: The Motors  WordPress plugin before 1.4.110 does not have proper authorisation and CSRF checks on...
description: The Motors  WordPress plugin before 1.4.110 does not have proper authorisation and CSRF checks on one of its AJAX actions, allowing unauthenticated attackers to modify arbitrary post metadata, such as the gallery, featured image and, on WooCommerce sites, product prices.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7859.

description: The ultimate-woocommerce-auction-pro WordPress plugin through 2.4.5 does not sanitise and escape a parameter before outputting it back in the page, leading to a Reflected Cross-Site Scripting which could be used against high privilege users such as admin

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4259.

title: The Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin before 1.14.0 does not sanitize and escape logs to be...
description: The Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin before 1.14.0 does not sanitize and escape logs to be displayed, allowing unauthenticated users to perform Stored XSS attacks against logged in administrator

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin allows unauthenticated attackers to execute Stored XSS attacks, potentially compromising the administrative interface. This could lead to unauthorized access, data theft, or further exploitation of the website.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Businesses (SMBs) using WordPress
recommended_actions: Update the Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin to version 1.14.0 or later to address the vulnerability.
Review and sanitize all logs and user inputs to prevent malicious scripts from being executed.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block XSS attempts.

title: The ultimate-woocommerce-auction-pro WordPress plugin through 2.4.5 does not sanitise and escape...
description: The ultimate-woocommerce-auction-pro WordPress plugin through 2.4.5 does not sanitise and escape a parameter before outputting it back in the page, leading to a Reflected Cross-Site Scripting which could be used against high privilege users such as admin

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4110.

title: The Pie Register  WordPress plugin before 3.8.4.10 does not use sufficiently random values when...
description: The Pie Register  WordPress plugin before 3.8.4.10 does not use sufficiently random values when generating its account verification tokens, allowing unauthenticated attackers to predict a valid token and activate an account without access to the associated email inbox.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to predict account verification tokens, enabling them to activate unauthorized accounts without access to the associated email inbox. This can lead to unauthorized access, account misuse, and potential data breaches.
recommended_actions: Update the Pie Register WordPress plugin to version 3.8.4.10 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Review and monitor user account activity for any unauthorized account activations.
Implement additional security measures, such as CAPTCHA or multi-factor authentication, to mitigate risks from unauthorized account creation.

title: An insecure process execution vulnerability exists in the pc-printer-updater.exe component of the...
description:
An insecure process execution vulnerability exists in the pc-printer-updater.exe component of the PaperCut Print Deploy Client for Windows. The application, which typically operates with high-level system privileges, attempts to perform an internal validation check by invoking a secondary system utility using an unqualified file reference.



Because the application does not specify an absolute path to this utility, it relies on the operating system's default search order to locate the executabl

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6645.

title: A permissive list of allowed inputs in ASUS Armoury Crate allows a local administrator to perform...
description:
A permissive list of allowed inputs in ASUS Armoury Crate allows a local administrator to perform arbitrary memory read/write operations or cause a system crash (BSOD) by bypassing the validation mechanism.Refer to the '
Security Update for Armoury Crate App ' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8918.

title: A vulnerability has been found in coollabsio coolify 4.0.0. Impacted is an unknown function of...
description: A vulnerability has been found in coollabsio coolify 4.0.0. Impacted is an unknown function of the component Image Name Handler. Such manipulation leads to os command injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way. The changelog for 4.1.2 mentions "[i]mproved image, branch, proxy, and deployment input validation".

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12815.

title: A vulnerability was identified in langflow-ai langflow up to 1.9.3. This affects an unknown...
description: A vulnerability was identified in langflow-ai langflow up to 1.9.3. This affects an unknown function of the component Bundle URL Loader. The manipulation leads to code injection. The attack needs to be performed locally. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the langflow-ai langflow up to version 1.9.3 allows for code injection via the Bundle URL Loader component. However, the attack requires local access, which limits its exploitability. If exploited, it could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code, potentially compromising the integrity and confidentiality of the system.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to a version of langflow-ai langflow newer than 1.9.3 as soon as a patch is available.
Restrict local access to trusted personnel and implement strict access controls to minimize the risk of exploitation.
Monitor the vendor's communication channels for updates or patches and apply them immediately once released.

title: A security flaw has been discovered in Browserbase up to 20260526. This impacts an unknown...
description: A security flaw has been discovered in Browserbase up to 20260526. This impacts an unknown function of the component Autobrowse Trace Artifact Handler. The manipulation results in incorrect default permissions. The attack requires a local approach. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12823.

title: A vulnerability was determined in FlowiseAI Flowise up to 3.1.2. The impacted element is an...
description: A vulnerability was determined in FlowiseAI Flowise up to 3.1.2. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file packages/components/nodes/documentloaders/S3/S3.ts of the component S3 Document Loader. Executing a manipulation can lead to path traversal. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in FlowiseAI Flowise up to version 3.1.2 allows for path traversal attacks via the S3 Document Loader component. This could potentially expose sensitive files or allow unauthorized access to restricted directories, depending on the deployment configuration.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to the latest version of FlowiseAI Flowise if available, or apply any patches provided by the vendor.
Implement strict access controls and input validation to mitigate potential exploitation of the S3 Document Loader.
Monitor application logs for unusual activity, particularly related to file access or directory traversal attempts.

title: A weakness has been identified in kortix-ai suna up to 0.8.38. Affected by this issue is the...
description: A weakness has been identified in kortix-ai suna up to 0.8.38. Affected by this issue is the function router.replace/router.push of the file apps/frontend/src/app/auth/page.tsx of the component Auth Endpoint. Executing a manipulation of the argument returnURL can lead to cross site scripting. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. Upgrading to version 0.8.39 can resolve this issue. This patch is called f5dec7aa0c1b8fa

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The identified vulnerability allows for cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks via the manipulation of the returnURL parameter in the Auth Endpoint. This could lead to unauthorized script execution in the context of the user's browser, potentially exposing sensitive user data or enabling session hijacking.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to version 0.8.39 of kortix-ai suna to apply the security patch (f5dec7aa0c1b8fa).
Conduct a security review of all input validation mechanisms, especially for the returnURL parameter, to prevent similar vulnerabilities.
Monitor systems for any unusual activity or signs of exploitation, and educate users about potential phishing attempts leveraging this vulnerability.

title: A security vulnerability has been detected in Radware Cyber Controller up to 10.11.0. This...
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in Radware Cyber Controller up to 10.11.0. This affects an unknown part of the component HTML Report Generation. The manipulation leads to HTML injection. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Radware Cyber Controller up to version 10.11.0 allows for HTML injection via the HTML Report Generation component. This could enable attackers to inject malicious scripts, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or defacement of reports. Remote exploitation increases the risk, but the low severity suggests limited impact or exploitation complexity.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade Radware Cyber Controller to the latest version if available, or apply any patches provided by the vendor.
Implement input validation and sanitization for the HTML Report Generation component to mitigate the risk of HTML injection.
Monitor systems for any signs of exploitation and review access logs for suspicious activity.
